description: Personalised Christmas Tree Ornament Decoration. Each one is hand personalised by us in house at Tabetha's Touch. The name and year of your choice can be written on the ornament The ornaments are poly resin with a high quality gloss finish giving the appearance of glazed ceramic (Please note the colours of the decorations cannot be changed).
